articles.title: MIL-INT (1-0): Interval. Rossoneri ahead with the least expected protagonist
articles.summary: Milan are ahead in this derby at half-time. From what we saw in these first 45 minutes, the Rossoneri team deserved the lead, scored in the 35th minute by the least expected man of all: Pervis Estupinan.

articles.title: Ambrosini: "Allegri always thinks about having an alternative during the match, Chivu instead immediately goes with the two available attackers"
